logic.value:
Please review your submission.

Update any relevant information as needed.

To help us recommend the best solutions for your company, we’d like to understand your current use of PEOs (Professional Employer Organizations) or EORs (Employer of Record providers).

1. This form only takes a few minutes.
2. If you currently work with a PEO or EOR, you’ll be able to share details about your vendor, costs, and countries covered.
3. Document uploads are optional and are the fastest way for us to benchmark your setup.
If you prefer not to upload right now, you can simply answer a few short questions instead.
What are your top considerations when exploring a PEO?
No, we have never considered a PEO
No, we have never considered a PEO
No, we have considered but decided against
No, we have considered but decided against
Would you be open to switching to another PEO or to a payroll-only solution?
What were the main reasons you decided not to use a PEO?
Other – please specify in Notes column
Other – please specify in Notes column
Monthly Cost per Employee/Contractor (enter number only)
Notes or Issues in that Country
Other details you’d like us to know
Made with Fillout, the easy way to make stunning forms
